name: bullkis1--rapid-prototyper
description: Ultra-fast proof-of-concept and MVP development. Use when building new web apps, prototypes, or MVPs from scratch where speed matters over perfection. Specializes in the canonical fast-stack: Next.js 14 + Supabase + Clerk + shadcn/ui + Prisma. Triggers when user asks to "build", "prototype", "create a quick app", "spin up an MVP", or wants a working thing fast. NOT for small one-liner fixes or edits to existing codebases.
